programmes.show_description: Party pop rock anthems spanning 5 decades! From Queen, Kiss & Aerosmith to Blur, Paramore & The White Stripes.
Live it loud and Max out on the finest rock anthems! Featuring Paramore, Imagine Dragons, Linkin Park, Evanescence & The Arctic Monkeys. This is Now Rock!
An hour of Anthems and the biggest rock songs from 90s rock legends Bon Jovi!
These are the legendary rock stars that made the 80s! Expect Meat Loaf, Bonnie Tyler, Queen, Bon Jovi, AC/DC, Iron Maiden & loads more!
Crammed full with extraordinary finds, hidden treasures, and plenty of old relics! From the Stones and Genesis, to KISS and INXS - how many of these family heirlooms do you own?
The Biggest Ballads from the royals of rock! From Queen, Bon Jovi & Whitesnake to Meat Loaf, Nickleback & Evanescence.
Laid back, timeless, soft rock tracks & big power ballads, each with an unforgettable chorus! Expect plenty of Fleetwood Mac, Foreigner, Pat Benatar, Spandau Ballet & Toto.
Turn it up to 11 for the finest rock anthems! Featuring Kings Of Leon, The Killers, Green Day, Biffy Clyro & The Foo Fighters. This is Now Rock!
In order, 20 of the biggest american anthems from the 21st Century featuring The Killers, Bon Jovi, Nickleback and One Republic.
Nothing but Anthems from USA! From AC/DC, Guns N Roses & Bon Jovi to Aerosmith, Green Day & Blondie.
A 2-hour run through, in order, of top 3 hits from the 90s - all with that rock n roll swagger! Expect plenty of U2, Def Leppard, Meat Loaf and Brit Pop!
Live it loud and Max out on the finest rock anthems! Featuring The Stroke, Sum 41, Linkin Park, Feeder & Limp Bizkit. This is Now Rock!
Turn up your speakers to 11 and live life even louder! Emo Anthems in order from Linkin Park in 2000 to The My Chemical Romance at the end of the Decade!
Turn it up to 11 for the finest rock anthems! Featuring Kings Of Leon, The Killers, Green Day, Biffy Clyro & The Foo Fighters. This is Now Rock!
These monsters were created for your enjoyment! 30 of the biggest, spine tingling anthems from legends like Meatloaf and Kiss through to My Chemical Romance and YungBlud!
Party pop rock anthems spanning 5 decades! From Queen, Kiss & Aerosmith to Blur, Paramore & The White Stripes.
Buckle up & join Nicky for a journey down the dark roads of rock! Monsters of metal, Ghastly Axe grinders & Devilish anthems. It's going to be a spine-tingling, HELL of a ride!
Turn it up to 11 for the finest rock anthems! Featuring Kings Of Leon, The Killers, Green Day, Biffy Clyro & The Foo Fighters. This is Now Rock!
These are power ladies who really rock! From Avril Lavigne and Pink to Amy Lee and Hayley Williams.
Over 7 hours and 3 decades of classic rock anthems back to back! Starting with Bon Jovi, Billy Idol & ZZ Top through to Razorlight, Green Day & the Foo Fighters!
A decade of mega hits and the loudest anthems! Expect Biffy Clyro, Linkin Park, Blink 182, Evanescence, Fall Out Boy & loads more!
From 1995 to 2009 - 30 minutes of the biggest rock songs from Green Day!
Turn it up to 11 for the finest rock anthems! Featuring Kings Of Leon, The Killers, Green Day, Biffy Clyro & The Foo Fighters. This is Now Rock!
Alex serves up 30 of the greatest, darkest, skinny jeans-iest, heavy eye makeup-iest & back-combed hair-iest anthems from the worlds most glorious miserable genre!
Turn it up to 11 for the finest rock anthems! Featuring Kings Of Leon, The Killers, Green Day, Biffy Clyro & The Foo Fighters. This is Now Rock!
50 of the the biggest most uplifting, feel good rock songs! With anthems from Jet, Queen, Kiss and David Bowie.
Claire Sturgess relives the 2010s with her 30 greatest heroes in rock and indie. The Vaccines, Biffy Clyro and Imagine Dragons are all in the Top 10, but who is her number 1?
